testcase.name: User Registration - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: And user enter f name "firstInPropFile".....................................passed And user enter l name "lastInPropFile"......................................passed And user enter mail "mailInPropFile"........................................passed And user enter telephone "teleInPropFile"...................................passed And user enter pass "passInPropFile"........................................passed And user enter conf password "confPasswordInPropFile".......................passed And user accept privacy policy..............................................passed And user clicks on continue button..........................................passed
